case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_calls.name: get_evidence
tool_calls.reasoning: Starting with full time scan of 0-180 seconds to identify initial metrics anomalies

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Productcatalogservice, currencyservice, and emailservice show latency anomalies. Initial candidates include productcatalogservice_latency, currencyservice_latency, and emailservice_latency.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-60s productcatalogservice metrics. Latency.p50 and p90 dev=+2.3/+2.1 confirm sustained latency anomalies. Traces show increased latency.p99 dev=+0.9/+0.7. No mem/cpu anomalies. Root cause is productcatalogservice_latency.
Productcatalogservice latency anomalies (p50/p90 dev=+2.3/+2.1) drive root cause. Traces confirm propagation. Currencyservice and emailservice show secondary latency/mem issues.
